scopes.name: self.read
scopes.description: Read the caller's own user data (profile, preferences, contact details).

scopes.name: self.write
scopes.description: Write the caller's own non-auth-relevant data (display name, avatar, preferences). Auth-relevant changes (email, password) require sensitive scopes.
